tasks.label: test: All
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build }; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build } }

tasks.label: test: Core
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build }

tasks.label: test: GUI
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build }

tasks.label: test: CLI
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build }

tasks.label: verify: Release Gate
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Release -m:1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build; dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build; dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build; dotnet publish src/RegiLattice.GUI/RegiLattice.GUI.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o publish/release/gui; dotnet publish src/RegiLattice.CLI/RegiLattice.CLI.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o publish/release/cli }
